item.title: A message from Guidance:
item.description: Students still working on their 40 volunteer hours are encouraged to check the Teams for approved opportunities or speak with a Guidance Counsellor for help getting started.

item.title: A message from 7/8 Athletics + Boys Softball:
item.description: Reminder that today is practice #4 for 7/8 Track & Field. We will meet in gym around 2:15pm. You must attend at least 3 out of the 5 practices in order to attend our meet. The last boys Softball tryout will be on Wednesday, May 27 2:30-3:30.

item.title: A message from Mr. Decoste:
item.description: Today will be the first tryout for 7/8 girls Softball.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: If your family has ordered Little Caesar's pizza kits, please note that kits will need to be picked up this Thursday, May 28, in the atrium after school

item.title: A message from the Main Office:
item.description: Students in grades 9 to 12 will be permitted to dress down during their exams if they donate at least 2 uniform items. The donated uniforms must be dropped off at the main office before June 12th.

item.title: A message from Mme. Perron
item.description: There will be a brief Europe Trip meeting today at lunch in room 125. All travelers must attend. Please be on time. It will be quick!

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval
item.description: Weight Room will be OPEN this week during lunch on Monday, Tuesday, and Wednesday from 10:40–11:20 a.m. We are also excited to launch our NEW Tuesday After School CrossFit Club from 2:15–3:15 p.m. featuring CrossFit-style workouts! All students in Grades 9–12 are welcome. Please see Mrs. Longval if you have any questions.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval
item.description: Congratulations to all of our student-athletes who competed at EOSSAA Track & Field Championships last Thursday and Friday! We are excited to announce that two STA athletes are moving on to OFSAA East Regionals this week in Brockville: Grade 12 student Seth Stapper, who placed 3rd in Senior Boys Javelin. Grade 9 student Charlotte Vance, who placed 5th in the 3000m run. Wishing both athletes the very best of luck this week! Mr. and Mrs. Longval are incredibly proud of all of our Varsity Track & Field athletes and everything they accomplished this season.

item.title: A message from Unity Club:
item.description: Don't forget to sign up for Elevate & Empower: More Than a Trend, in honour of Asian Heritage Month. The event takes place this Wednesday, and the QR code to sign up should be in every class room. See Mrs. Kwok if you have questions.
